title: Observability, Capacity, Flow Control, Alarms, and SLOs · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links.
Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together.
Model arrival rate, service rate, concurrency, oldest age, burst, retry amplification, byte volume, and recovery time for capacity decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Message Flow Telemetry
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 1039 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine backlog state, oldest age, SLO, and resource alarms into bounded operations action; record causal telemetry without message IDs as metric labels; then lower the byte or in-flight budget and preserve upstream rejection evidence. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Instrument publish, confirm, return, route, deliver, process, ack, retry, dead-letter, and effect phases with bounded identities and causal links.

Inspect the Message Flow Telemetry trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Messaging Slo Alert, keep Messaging Slo Alert connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity SLOs with symptom and cause alerts.

hints: For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Messaging Slo Alert, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Messaging Slo Alert precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Messaging Slo Alert, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug messaging team handles case 6087 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine backlog state, oldest age, SLO, and resource alarms into bounded operations action; record causal telemetry without message IDs as metric labels; then fail the canary and prove older consumers remain compatible during rollback. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define availability, acceptance, routing, processing latency, age, loss, duplicate, poison, recovery, and capacity SLOs with symptom and cause alerts.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Messaging Slo Alert, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Broker uptime is an adequate end-to-end messaging SLO.
